what_it_does: Stores ledger metadata for an image asset (PNG) named item-8ba3fa08 posted in the dragnet-development channel under the comment/item-8ba3fa08 path, including its blob reference, dimensions, authorship, versioning, and links.
observations: YAML frontmatter-only Markdown file with no body content
Represents an image/png with recorded width and height of 0
References a blob://b2 URI for the actual image bytes
Has a single version (v1) whose blob matches the current blob
Created and updated timestamps are identical
No links and an empty alt text are present
Author session is 'tim' and source is 'claude_code'
standouts: Zero width and height recorded for an image asset
Created and updated timestamps are identical
No alt text or links provided
conventions: YAML frontmatter in a Markdown wrapper
Uses blob:// URI for content addressing
Includes id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, dimensions, authorship, versioning, and links fields
concerns: Image dimensions are 0x0, which may indicate missing metadata extraction
No alt text limits accessibility and context
No links or provenance beyond author_session
notes: This is a bare asset ledger card for a single PNG comment image with minimal metadata.
questions: Why are width and height zero for an image?
What content does the referenced blob contain?
Is the missing alt text intentional?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog an image asset; it does record the asset identity and blob reference, but the zero dimensions and empty alt suggest the catalog entry is incomplete.
intention_signals: To register a specific image comment asset in the dragnet-development channel so it can be referenced by id, address, and blob in the ledger.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable metadata record for one image asset, including its blob reference and version snapshot, which a fused system can retain as a canonical ledger entry.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger metadata file describing a PNG image asset named item-8ba3fa08 in dragnet-development with blob reference, zero dimensions, author tim, and version 1.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and make addressable a single comment image asset within the dragnet-development channel ledger.
